job_description: About the jobYou love to think about algorithms?Complex problems are puzzles you are eager to solve?You want to create software that impacts the lives of millions of people?You want to be part of a highly skilled team?Sounds like you are an ALGOMIND!Who We Are – AlgoMindsAlgoMinds is a Germany-based technology company focused on softwarearchitecture, distributed systems, and cloud-native platforms for complexenterprise environments.We work on high-impact, high-complexity systems where correctness, scalability,and long-term maintainability matter. Our projects span large enterprises acrossmultiple sectors, including logistics, aviation, energy, and digital platforms.AlgoMinds is built around a team of senior software architects and engineers whocare deeply about clean design, strong fundamentals, and collaborativeproblem-solving. We value excellence without ego, ownership withoutmicromanagement, and continuous learning as part of everyday work.Your MissionAs a Software Architect at AlgoMinds, you will: * Own complex problems end-to-end — from deep understanding to production-ready solutions * Design and build cloud-based platforms at planetary scale for enterprise environments * Research, design, and optimize algorithms, balancing performance, scalability, and elegance * Analyze existing architectures, identify weaknesses, trade-offs, and improvement opportunities * Invent and build frameworks and reusable components that enable other engineers to move faster * Translate complex technical challenges into clear architectural decisions * Mentor developers and engineers, raising the technical level of the whole team * Set architectural standards and best practices across projectsAt AlgoMinds, architects are trusted to deliver — through discipline,collaboration, and technical excellence.About YouYou are more than a strong developer — you are a system thinker and technicalleader. You bring: * A Master’s degree or PhD in Computer Science, Mathematics, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field * Strong foundations in mathematics, algorithms, and computational theory * Proven experience in algorithm design, complexity analysis, and performance optimization * Deep expertise in C# / .NET * Strong background in distributed systems and micro-service architectures * Solid experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and/or Kubernetes * Expert-level Infrastructure as Code skills, with strong, hands-on Pulumi experience * Experience with NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Cassandra, or similar) * Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps, GitHub, or similar) * Practical AI / ML experience, such as model fine-tuning, building agentic systems, or integrating intelligent decision-making components into production architectures * Ability to lead technical discussions and influence architectural decisions * A natural drive to mentor, share knowledge, and elevate others * Based in Germany Why AlgoMinds * Highly skilled team of software architects and senior engineers * Continuous learning and mutual technical growth * Work on enterprise-grade systems across multiple industries * Build products and platforms from scratch, not just maintain legacy systems * Growing company with flat hierarchies and real ownership * Remote-first culture with flexible working hoursShow more Show less

job_description: NVIDIA’s Worldwide Field Operations (WWFO) team is looking for a SolutionsArchitect with deep expertise Generative AI post-training from data processingto model alignment, with a strong background in Large Language Models (LLMs). Inparticular, we are seeking someone skilled in data preparation and curation forlarge-scale model training, as well as in LLM alignment techniques such asreinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and Supervised Finetuning(SFT).In this role, you will operate at the intersection of innovative AI research andreal-world applications. You will work as the primary technical specialist forNVIDIA customers, helping drive innovation powered by NVIDIA’s hardware andsoftware platform. You will develop proof-of-concept solutions, demonstrateadvanced neural network architectures, and help customers adapt and optimizefoundation models using NVIDIA technologies for their specific domains. A keypart of this role involves close collaboration with a wide range of team membersincluding developers, data scientists, IT managers, and senior executives.The ideal candidate is an experienced AI specialist with a solid foundation inLLMs and expertise across data processing techniques including large scale datacuration, cleaning and Synthetic Data Generation. The candidate should haveconfirmed experience in Large-Scale post-training using supervised fine-tuningand/or Reinforcement Learning techniques. Hands-on experience applyingtechniques related to reinforcement learning for LLM alignment is a nice tohave.What You Will Be Doing * Serve as the primary technical expert to NVIDIA's customers, understanding their technology and providing guidance on post training process in terms of tools and methodology. * Build proof-of-concepts and demonstrations that highlight the power of NVIDIA AI platforms applied to LLMs post training. * Partner with developers, researchers, technology specialists, IT professionals, and executives to facilitate the integration of NVIDIA technology. * Partner with Engineering, Product and Sales teams to develop, plan best suitable solutions for customers. Enable development and growth of product features through customer feedback and proof-of-concept evaluations. What We Need To See * MS/PhD or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Data Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, other Engineering fields. * Deep expertise in AI/Deep Learning, with hands-on experience in training and finetuning LLMs. * Expertise with deep learning frameworks for training LLMs (PyTorch, Megatron-LM, Nemo, Transformers, TRL, VeRL) * Excellent verbal, written communication, and technical presentation skills in English. * 6+ years' work or research experience with Python/ C++ / other software development * AI passionate with a growth mindset, ability to collaborate effectively with different teams (Engineering, Product, Sales, Marketing) in a rapid evolving environment while continuously learning and sharing insights. Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd * Familiarity with NVIDIA Nemo Collection (Nemo-Curator, Nemo-RL, Megatron-Bridge). * Track record in data processing as well as running LLM training and customization with Reinforcement Learning approaches. * Understanding of HPC systems: data center architecture high speed interconnect InfiniBand, Cluster Storage and Scheduling related design and/or management experience. Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd * Demonstrated experience in successfully profiling and optimizing large-scale deep learning training on NVIDIA supercomputers, with a significant focus on high-performance networking enhancements. * Experience with distributed deep learning, distributed training frameworks, or large-scale data pipelines enhanced by high-performance networking solutions. * Expertise in optimizing networking parameters, such as bandwidth, latency, or congestion control, for deep learning workloads. * Familiarity with NVIDIA's networking technologies, such as Mellanox InfiniBand, and their integration with deep learning workflows. * Strong understanding of high-performance networking protocols and standards and their application to deep learning. job_description: At Promon, we protect the apps people rely on every day. Our award-winningapplication shielding solutions are trusted globally across finance, telecom,healthcare, and beyond. Now, we’re entering a new chapter: building acloud-based platform that will power the next generation of app security.This is your opportunity to shape the core architecture behind Promon’s futureplatform, designing the systems, patterns and technical foundations that willenable smarter, more adaptive security across our products. You’ll help turn ourlong-term vision into strategy and hands-on execution, working at the center ofan initiative that will define how Promon evolves in the years ahead.The RoleIn this role, you’ll lead the architectural direction of Promon’s new cloudplatform, defining how our systems evolve and scale in the future. You’ll workhands-on to design, prototype and validate core components, collaboratingclosely with engineers, product teams and technical leaders. This position isideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of strategy and execution, andwants to influence the technical foundation of a global security product.What You’ll Be Responsible For * Define and lead the architectural direction for Promon’s next-generation cloud platform, establishing the technical foundations that guide how our systems evolve and scale. * Design, prototype and validate core platform components, working hands-on to explore new technologies, solve complex distributed-system challenges, and ensure reliability, security and performance. * Collaborate across teams to align architecture with product strategy, providing guidance, patterns and technical leadership that elevate engineering practices and support informed decision-making. What You’ll BringDeep Technical Expertise * Strong background in cloud architecture, distributed systems and large-scale data pipelines, ideally with hands-on experience in GCP. * Solid understanding of event streaming technologies (e.g., Pub/Sub, Kafka, Beam, Dataflow, Flink, Spark) and how to design systems that handle massive, continuous event flows. * Practical skills in one or more programming languages (Python, Rust, Go, Java, TypeScript, etc.) and the willingness to build prototypes, validate ideas and dig into code when needed. * Ability to design suitable APIs with an understanding of front-end web technologies like React. Strong Architectural & Analytical Thinking * Ability to design architectures that balance reliability, performance, cost, privacy and global scale. * Skilled at navigating ambiguity and turning complex, undefined problem spaces into clear architectural direction. * Strong modelling and communication skills, able to articulate concepts and trade-offs to engineers, product managers and system architects. * Solid awareness of security, privacy and data governance considerations when designing systems that handle sensitive telemetry. AI & Behavioral Insight Expertise * Experience applying machine learning in production systems, including designing data flows, behavioral models and inference pipelines. * Strong intuition for anomalies, behavioral patterns and the signals that distinguish normal activity from risk. Leadership Through Influence & Ownership * Collaborative mindset with the ability to guide decisions and align teams without direct authority. * Clear, confident communication grounded in expertise rather than hierarchy. * Operates effectively as a senior individual contributor - curious, proactive and comfortable exploring complex systems, identifying issues and driving experimentation. Why You'll Thrive As A Promoneer📱 At Promon you'll be at the forefront of game-changing technology,contributing to world-leading, future-focused innovations. Your contributionswill help shape the future as we relentlessly pursue groundbreaking solutionsthat redefine industry standards.⛷ With our Nordic values, you'll have a chance to immerse in a Nordic workculture renowned for innovation, flat hierarchy, and inclusivity.📈 Promon is planning on significant growth in the coming years. job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELAssociateEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONInformation TechnologyINDUSTRIESProfessional Services
job_description: Als Unternehmensberatung für Software und Analytics unterstützt die cognitivo AGmit intelligenten IT- und Branchenlösungen sowie fachlich fundierterstrategischer Beratung. Mit unserer Kompetenz im Bereich Software und Analyticstragen wir dazu bei, Prozesse zu optimieren, neue Geschäftsmodelle zu entwickelnund den Weg in Zeiten der digitalen Transformation zu ebnen.Wir sind seit vielen Jahren ein gefragter Partner von Versicherungen, Banken undFinanzdienstleister und suchen aktuell einen erfahrenen AI Architect (m/w/d),der unser Team verstärkt.Aufgaben * Du bist verantwortlich für die Konzeption und Entwicklung einer innovativen Softwarearchitektur, die auf RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) und MCP (Multi-Chain Processing) basierenden KI-Agentensysteme unterstützt. Dabei sorgen Sie für eine effiziente Strukturierung und Integration der Komponenten, um die Leistungsfähigkeit und Skalierbarkeit der Systeme sicherzustellen * Du erforschst und entwickelst neue Methoden und Ansätze, um die Grenzen großer Sprachmodelle zu erweitern. Ziel ist es, die Fähigkeiten der Modelle zu verbessern und ihre Einsatzmöglichkeiten in komplexen Anwendungsfällen zu erweitern * Du wählst geeignete Large Language Models (LLMs), wie beispielsweise OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini und andere, aus und integrierst diese in die bestehende Systemarchitektur. Zudem bindest Du verschiedene Agentic-Frameworks, wie LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, PydanticAI oder Agno, ein, um die Funktionalität der KI-Agenten zu erweitern * Du baust Agentic-Reasoning-Mechanismen sowie RAG-Pipelines auf, bspw. auf Basis von Tools wie PromptFlow, LangGraph oder ähnlichen Frameworks. Dabei entwickelst Du Verfahren, die es den KI-Agenten ermöglichen, komplexe Aufgaben durch reasoning und retrieval-gestützte Prozesse effizient zu bewältigen * Du orchestrierst die Integration und den Ablauf verschiedener Tools und Komponenten, um komplexe Multi-Chain Processing (MCP) und Agent-Flows zu steuern und zu optimieren. Dabei stellst Du sicher, dass alle Komponenten nahtlos zusammenarbeiten und die gewünschten Ergebnisse erzielen * Du führst eine methodische Evaluation der entwickelten KI-Systeme durch, um ihre Leistungsfähigkeit, Zuverlässigkeit und Effizienz zu messen. Dabei verwendest Du geeignete Testverfahren und Metriken, um die Qualität der Systeme kontinuierlich zu verbessern Qualifikation * Nachweisbare Erfahrung als Software Architect, Solution Architect oder in einer vergleichbaren Rolle, idealerweise mit Fokus auf KI/ML-Systeme * Tiefgehendes Verständnis von modernen KI-Architekturen, insbesondere Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), Vektor-Datenbanken, Model Context Protocol (MCP) und Agent-to-Agent-Kommunikation (A2A). * Fundierte Kenntnisse in der Softwareentwicklung und im Design verteilter Systeme (on premise) * Du hast ein gutes Verständnis von Daten-Engineering-Prinzipien und Datenbanktechnologien (SQL, Vector DBs) * Ausgeprägte konzeptionelle Fähigkeiten, strategisches Denken und die Fähigkeit, komplexe technische Sachverhalte verständlich zu kommunizieren * Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Studium oder PhD in der Informatik, Wirtschaftsinformatik, Mathematik, Physik oder einer verwandten Fachrichtung * Du bringst Begeisterung für Innovationen im KI-Bereich und die Gestaltung zukunftsweisender Lösungen mit * Hohe technische Kompetenz, das bedeutet, dass du in der Lage bist, komplexe Software zu entwickeln und produktionstauglich zu machen * Du arbeitest eigenverantwortliche und bringst gleichzeitig ein ausgeprägtes Teamverständnis. * Sehr gute Entscheidungswegen * Spannende Projekte für große, internationale Unternehmen * Benefits (Edenredkarte, Jobrad, betriebliche Altersvorsorge, etc.) * Ein umfangreiches Weiterbildungsangebot * Moderne Software & Tools, Mobilität bei Projekteinsätzen * Unbefristeter Arbeitsvertrag mit attraktiver Vergütung und 30 Urlaubstage pro Jahr * Flexible Arbeitszeiten für die perfekte Work-Life-Balance Wir bieten Dir ein aufstrebendes und innovatives Arbeitsumfeld, in dem Du DeineFähigkeiten und Kenntnisse erweitern und weiterentwickeln kannst.Wenn Du eine Leidenschaft für die Gestaltung und Umsetzung hochwertigerSoftwarelösungen hast und gerne in einem Team arbeitest, freuen wir uns aufDeine Bewerbung.Interessiert? Dann freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung!Show more Show less

job_description: Als Senior AI Solution Architect (m/w/d) gestaltest du bei Materna ganzheitlicheKI-Architekturen – von der ersten Idee über die technische Konzeption bis zurerfolgreichen Umsetzung. In interdisziplinären Teams entwickelst duEnde-zu-Ende-Lösungen auf Basis moderner Data-Analytics- und KI-Technologien fürden öffentlichen Sektor, z. B. in Verwaltung, Mobilitätsdatenplattformen undSmart Cities. Dabei stellst du die Integration in bestehende IT-Landschaftensicher und behältst Sicherheit, Compliance (DSGVO, EU AI Act) sowie europäischeStandards stets im Blick.Sei Teil unserer digitalen Erfolgsgeschichte und gestalte mit uns dieverantwortungsvolle Nutzung von KI in der öffentlichen Verwaltung.Als Senior AI Solution Architect * führst du die Analyse fachlicher und technischer Anforderungen durch, und erstellst darauf basierend die Entwicklung tragfähiger Zielbilder, Lösungsarchitekturen und Umsetzungsroadmaps. * konzipierst du KI-Lösungen (z.B. komplexe KI-Agenten basierte Systeme) unter Berücksichtigung von Datenschutz, IT-Sicherheit und der regulatorischen Anforderungen des Public Sectors. * stellst du die Integration in bestehende IT-Landschaften und Fachverfahren der öffentlichen Verwaltung sicher. * erstellst du Architekturkonzepte, Integrations- und Betriebsmodellen für On-Premise-, Cloud- oder Hybridumgebungen. * arbeitest du eng mit Projektmanagement, Data Scientists, AI-Engineers, Softwareentwicklung und Fachbereichen der Kunden zusammen. * begleitest du Umsetzungen als Architektur-Lead und übernimmst Qualitätssicherung sowie Reviews von Pipelines, APIs und Infrastrukturkonzepten bis zur Produktivsetzung beim Kunden * berätst du Kunden auf allen Ebenen in marktrelevanten Trend- und Zukunftsthemen und entwickelst individuelle Lösungskonzepte mit unseren Technologiepartnern für anspruchsvolle Umsetzungsprojekte. Dein ProfilDas bringst du mit * Abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Mathematik oder vergleichbarer Qualifikation. * Mehrjährige Jahre Erfahrung in der Konzeption und Umsetzung von Daten-basierten Lösungen, idealerweise im Public-Sector-Umfeld. * Fundierte Kenntnisse in modernen KI-Architekturen, LLM-Ökosystemen (z. B. LangChain, vLLM, RAG-Pipelines, Embedding-Modelle) und Data-Engineering-Konzepte. * Gutes Verständnis von Softwarereferenzarchitekturen, API-Design, Microservices, Containerisierung (Docker/Kubernetes) und MLOps-/AIOps-Prozessen. * Erfahrung mit Datenschutz (DSGVO), Informationssicherheit und Compliance-Anforderungen im öffentlichen Sektor. * Sehr gute Deutsch (C1)- und gute Englischkenntnisse (B2) in Wort und Schrift Das zeichnet dich aus * Du triffst fundierte Architekturentscheidungen – von Modellwahl über Compute-Anforderungen bis zu Deployment-Strategien und Skalierungsmodellen – und vertrittst diese sicher gegenüber Stakeholdern. * Du erklärst komplexe technische Zusammenhänge verständlich und zielgruppengerecht. * Du bringst hohe Beratungskompetenz, ausgeprägtes konzeptionelles Denken und Freude an der Zusammenarbeit in interdisziplinären Teams mit. * Du handelst strategisch und unternehmerisch, denkst kundenorientiert und findest kreative Lösungen für technische Herausforderungen. Deine Vorteile * Flexibles Arbeiten: Halte Arbeits- und Privatleben in Balance – mit unserem flexiblen Arbeitszeitsystem und 40% mobilem Arbeiten. * Wissensaustausch: Du möchtest über den Tellerrand hinausschauen? In unseren Brown-Bag-Sessions, Developer-Summits und Communities hast du die Gelegenheit dazu! * Learning@Materna: Mit über 100 Schulungs- und Weiterbildungsangeboten unterstützen wir dich bei deiner persönlichen Weiterentwicklung! * Flache Hierarchien: Deine Ideen brauchen keine langen Entscheidungswege: Bei uns kannst du anpacken und mitgestalten! * Job Rad: Neues Bike gefällig? Mit Job-Rad unterstützen wir dich dabei dein Wunsch-Fahrrad zu leasen. Interessiert? Werde Teil der Materna-Story!Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung! Bei erfolgreicher Bewerbung wirst duzunächst zu einem virtuellen Interview eingeladen.Wende dich bei Fragen gerne an mich.Anna Pax * Talent Acquisition Manager * anna.pax@materna.groupShow more Show less

job_description: Who we areBitrock is a high-end consulting and system integration company, stronglycommitted to offering cutting-edge and innovative solutions. Wetake a holistic approach to technology: we consider each system in its totality,as a set of interconnected elements that work together to meet business needs.We thrive on overcoming challenges to help our clients reach their goals, bysupporting them in the following areas: Data, AI & ML Engineering; Back-endEngineering, Platform Engineering, Front-end Engineering, Product Design & UXEngineering, Mobile App Development, Quality Assurance, FinOps, GovernanceTheeffectiveness our solutions also stems from partnerships with key technologyvendors, like HashiCorp, Confluent, Lightbend, Databricks, and Meterian.Who we are looking forWe're seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Software Engineer /Solution Architect to join our dynamic team. This pivotal role requires deepexpertise in the Java/JVM ecosystem, modern microservice architectures, andcomplex data management. A critical focus of this role is designing and buildingAI Agents that are context-aware and capable of complex actions, utilizing theModel Context Protocol (MCP) and Spring AI.Who you areThe ideal candidate will bridge architectural design with hands-onimplementation, driving the development of secure, scalable, andhigh-performance applications that leverage the full potential of connected AI.Key Responsibilities * AI Agent & MCP Development: Design, develop, and deploy sophisticated AI Agents using Spring AI. Crucially, lead the implementation and integration of the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling agents to securely and efficiently access external data, tools, and services (databases, APIs, file systems). * Architecture & Design: Define and implement robust, scalable, and secure system architectures, specializing in Java/Spring-based microservices. Customer Engagement * Act as the primary technical advisor for enterprise customers, shaping long-term strategy for data modernization, analytics, and AI adoption. * Build trusted relationships with CIOs, CTOs, architects, and data leaders to guide cloud, governance, and integration decisions. * Drive clarity in complex, multi‑vendor environments. * End‑to‑End Solution Architecture * Design scalable, secure, AI‑ready architectures using Azure Data Services, Microsoft Fabric (Lakehouse, Warehouse, Real-Time Intelligence), and Purview. * Integrate external data and analytics platforms, including: * Databricks (Delta Lake ingestion, Unity Catalog integration, orchestration with Fabric pipelines) * Snowflake (data sharing, query federation patterns, ingestion via Fabric or ADF) * SAP systems (Operational Reporting, BW/4HANA, ECC/S4 via Azure Data Factory, ODP, or SAP CDC connectors) * Define multi-cloud and hybrid architectures enabling interoperability across ecosystems. * Ensure all solutions follow Secure-by-Design, Zero Trust, and enterprise‑grade governance principles. * Modernization, Migration & Analytics Enablement * Lead modernization journeys from legacy platforms (DB2, Oracle, IBM Cognos, PostgreSQL, AWS‑based analytics) to Azure and Fabric. * Drive ingestion strategies: batch, streaming, CDC, mirroring, SAP extraction, or event‑driven patterns. * Enable analytics on SAP by designing integration pipelines into Fabric Lakehouse or Azure Data Lake using SAP connectors, OData, ODP, or third‑party integration services. * Optimize compute and storage integration between Fabric and Databricks/Snowflake environments for analytical performance. * Governance, Security & Compliance * Implement Microsoft Purview for enterprise governance, lineage, access controls, classification, and policy enforcement across Microsoft + non‑Microsoft systems. * Design secure networking and identity strategies leveraging Private Link, Managed Private Endpoints, Workspace Identity, and Workload Identity Federation. * Ensure compliance with global and industry-specific regulations. * AI, Automation & Intelligence Integration * Integrate AI across data pipelines and analytics architectures using Azure ML, Cognitive Services, Fabric ML experiences, and Copilot extensibility. * Build end‑to‑end AI solutions using data from Databricks, Snowflake, SAP, and on‑prem sources. * Guide customers on responsible AI, scalable MLOps, and value‑driven experimentation (POCs/MVPs). * Skilling, Community & Reusability * Deliver workshops, hackathons, and technical enablement sessions covering Fabric, Data engineering, AI, and integrations with Databricks/Snowflake/SAP. * Share best practices, reference architectures, and reusable accelerators across internal and customer teams. * Mentor peers and elevate technical maturity across accounts. job_description: We are looking for a Software Architect with a strong focus on AI/ML to designand implement cutting-edge generative AI solutions. In this position, you willtake full ownership of technical design decisions, define AI architecturestrategy, and ensure the successful integration of advanced AI models into acomplex AdTech platform.Become an AI trailblazer in a growing department with executive support. Driveinnovation in a mature, well-established platform while collaborating withindustry leaders and international teams. From day one, build a scalable AIarchitecture with full ownership and support.This is a unique opportunity combines classic architectural leadership withmodern AI technologies to drive product innovation and make a tangible impact onthe advertising industry.CUSTOMEROur Customer is a Swedish AdTech company that transforms the way publishers andadvertisers interact. They provide state-of-the-art self-serve advertisingplatforms that enable seamless, direct transactions between advertisers and someof the world’s largest publishers. Their mission is to make advertising moreaccessible, automated, and efficient through innovative technology. Together weserve globally recognized clients such as TripAdvisor, Bloomberg, The WashingtonPost, Opera, Dow Jones, etc.At Sigma Software, we collaborate with industry leaders like our Сustomer topush the boundaries of AI-driven automation in AdTech. As we continue to grow,we are looking for top talents to help shape the future of advertising withcutting-edge AI solutions. Join us in building intelligent, scalable, andimpactful products in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.PROJECTThe project is a scalable, white-label ad platform used by major globalpublishers. It integrates AI-driven automation to enhance advertisingtransactions, targeting efficiency, and personalization. As part of thisinitiative, you’ll design AI architecture from the ground up, ensuringproduction-ready, scalable solutions.Job Description * AI Strategy & Integration: Design, train, and deploy production-grade ML models (using AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, Comprehend) for predictive analytics, anomaly detection, recommendation engines, and automation. * MLOps & Model Serving: Own the entire ML model lifecycle, from training and versioning to secure, low-latency deployment (Model Serving) on AWS. * Data Strategy & Governance: Define and implement a company-wide data strategy, including governance, quality, lineage, and access control. * Partner with the Domain Expert to formalize AI-driven rules within the BRD. * AI Governance: Implement robust monitoring for model drift, bias, and performance. * Explainability (XAI): Develop and expose "explainability" endpoints for critical AI decisions (e.g., campaign rejection) to support governance and the Agentic Economy. * Collaboration: Work with the Platform Back-End Dev to define data pipelines and API contracts for real-time model inference. Qualifications * Leadership: Proven experience building and leading centralized Data/AI teams, including data engineering, data science, and MLOps functions. * Cloud MLOps: 5+ years of experience deploying ML models into production on AWS (SageMaker, MLOps pipelines). * SaaS AI Deployment: Experience deploying AI-powered features into customer-facing SaaS platforms, from recommender systems to intelligent assistants. * API Serving: Proven expertise in exposing ML inference via scalable, low-latency REST APIs. * Data Pipelines: Strong background designing and managing high-volume data pipelines (e.g., Kinesis, Kafka, Spark) for feature engineering. * Model Governance: Experience implementing model monitoring, drift detection, and XAI frameworks, including establishing an AI governance framework with model inventory, explainability standards, and ethical review processes. * Statistical Modeling: Advanced degree (MS/PhD) in Computer Science, Statistics, or a quantitative field. * Strategy: Demonstrated ability to translate AI capabilities into product strategy, driving alignment with Product, Engineering, and Business teams. * Data Security & Privacy: Deep understanding of data security, PII handling, and privacy-by-design (GDPR, CCPA, SOC2) as applied to ML systems. * Upper-Intermediate level of English or higher * Preferred Qualifications: * AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty. * NLP & GenAI: Experience with NLP for content analysis (e.g., creative validation) or LLM integration, including LLMOps, GenAI safety, prompt versioning, and evaluation. * Experience with probabilistic programming or causal inference. Additional InformationPERSONAL PROFILE * Strong leadership and an ownership mindset * Ability to innovate in mature, large-scale systems * Comfortable working in international, cross-functional teams * Passion for AI/ML and emerging technologiesShow more Show less

business leaders to understand their application, data, and AI priorities, and design secure, scalable solutions that drive business value and customer satisfaction. * Lead technical engagements delivery results, ensuring completeness and accuracy of consumption and customer success plans in collaboration with the CSAM. * Drive next best actions and generate incremental pipeline from each engagement, aligning with Unified Enterprise Support (ES) priorities. * Deliver repeatable intellectual property (IP) and contribute to centralized IP development to accelerate deployment and achieve targeted outcomes. * Provide delivery oversight and escalation support for key Factory engagements across AI and App Innovation projects. * Lead the health, resiliency, security, and optimization of improvements and remove adoption blockers. * Support customer skilling through technical workshops, readiness activities, and recommendations that ensure solution performance, maintainability, and reliability. * Maintain deep technical expertise and stay current with Azure, AI, GitHub, and cloud-native development trends, while contributing to internal and external technical communities. * Be accredited and certified to deliver with advanced and expert-level proficiency in priority workloads including Azure AI Foundry, AKS, App Service, Cosmos DB, Azure SQL, PostgreSQL, APIM, and GitHub. * Demonstrate a growth mindset by continuously aligning your skills to customer needs, contributing to knowledge sharing, and mentoring others to accelerate customer outcomes. job_description: DescriptionJoin GlobalLogic’s Architects Team within the Healthcare Business Unit,supporting clients across the EMEA region. This strategic role focuses onengaging new clients, designing advanced AI solutions for medical imageanalysis, and launching projects involving computer vision, deep learning, andgenerative AI. You’ll work on cutting-edge use cases like diagnostic assistance,surgical planning, and radiology automation, bringing meaningful impact topatient care. If you’re passionate about AI in healthcare and want to driveinnovation with real-world results, we’d love to hear from you.Requirements * Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, AI, Biomedical Engineering, or a related field. * 7+ years of experience in AI/ML with at least 4 years focused on computer vision and deep learning. * Proven experience with CNN architectures (e.g., ResNet, UNet, EfficientNet, VGG). * Experience with GANs (e.g., CycleGAN, StyleGAN, Pix2Pix) and synthetic image generation. * Hands-on with TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, and related vision libraries. * Strong understanding of preprocessing techniques for medical imaging data (e.g., DICOM, NIfTI). * Familiarity with training in cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP). * Experience in deploying models and integrating with PACS systems or cloud-native imaging stacks. * Solid understanding of model performance metrics and validation strategies for imaging. * Excellent communication skills and at least Upper-Intermediate English level. Preferred Qualifications (Nice To Have) * Experience with FDA/CE Class B or C medical imaging products. * Familiarity with explainable AI (Grad-CAM, LIME) and fairness techniques for imaging models. * Knowledge of FHIR, HL7, and healthcare data standards. * Understanding of HIPAA, GDPR, or other relevant data protection regulations. * Experience with AI for surgical robotics, augmented reality in healthcare, or histopathology image analysis. * Involvement in technical presales or client advisory initiatives. Job responsibilities * Design, develop, and optimize AI models for computer vision, segmentation, objects detection, image classification, etc. * Lead computer vision and AI solutioning in client engagements and presales discussions. * Build CNN- and GAN-based architectures tailored for healthcare and medical imaging use cases. * Prepare and preprocess large-scale datasets from modalities like X-ray, CT, MRI, and digital pathology. * Guide annotation strategies and quality control for labeled data. * Collaborate with cloud, DevOps, and QA teams to integrate models into production pipelines. * Ensure model robustness, explainability, and regulatory readiness (e.g., traceability, reproducibility). * Conduct technical workshops and communicate complex concepts to clients in an accessible way. * Stay current with research trends and evaluate new techniques for potential integration. * Contribute to internal accelerators, frameworks, and IP development. What we offerCulture of caring. At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Acrossevery region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first.From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance andbelonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections withcollaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.Learning and development. We are committed to your continuous learning anddevelopment. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with manyopportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career atGlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogicoffers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunitiesto grow personally and professionally.Interesting & meaningful work. GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact forand with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chanceto work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage yourcuriosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimaginewhat’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll havethe privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactfulsolutions shaping the world today.Balance and flexibility. We believe in the importance of balance andflexibility. With many functional career areas, roles, and work arrangements,you can explore ways of achieving the perfect balance between your work andlife. Your life extends beyond the office, and we always do our best to help youintegrate and balance the best of work and life, having fun along the way!High-trust organization. We are a high-trust organization where integrity iskey. By joining GlobalLogic, you’re placing your trust in a safe, reliable, andethical global company. Integrity and trust are a cornerstone of our valueproposition to our employees and clients. You will find truthfulness, candor,and integrity in everything we do.About GlobalLogicGlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partnerto the world’s largest and most forward-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’vebeen at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of themost innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today wecontinue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefiningindustries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.Show more Show less

top_third_assessment.headline_verdict: Title matches the JD wording, but the top third immediately introduces multiple ungrounded/overstated claims (agentic AI at current employer, 85% test coverage, multi-million users, CQRS/EventStore) that reduce trust for a staff-level architect screen.
top_third_assessment.tagline_verdict: No pronouns (good). The summary answers “who/what” but mixes strong claims with weak proof and adds metrics/tech not supported by the master CV; it also doesn’t signal Bedrock/Textract/Nova, RAG, governance/guardrails, or multi-agent orchestration artifacts.
top_third_assessment.achievements_verdict: Some achievements are compelling and aligned (75% incident reduction, 3 years zero downtime, billions of events/day) but the list mixes reliability ops with “agentic AI” claims that aren’t evidenced in the master CV; several bullets are generic or unverifiable.
top_third_assessment.competencies_verdict: Well-structured, ATS-friendly sections, but missing many critical JD keywords (Amazon Bedrock, Textract, Nova, RAG, LangGraph/LangChain, AI governance/guardrails, IAM/VPC). Also includes tech not evidenced in the master CV (e.g., Kubernetes).
top_third_assessment.first_impression_summary: Strong AWS/event-driven architect with real reliability wins, but the Agentic AI positioning feels under-evidenced and several claims look injected, so trust and JD-fit drop.

job_description: At Kognitiv Inc., we’re redefining what it means to be a Workday partner. As oneof the fastest-growing companies in the ecosystem, we bring deep expertise,innovative thinking, and a people-first mindset to everything we do. We’re notjust building better Workday solutions—we’re building a company where talentedpeople thrive.Ready to do your best work? Join us.The Principal AI Agent Architect & Strategy Consultant is a senior-level,client-facing expert responsible for establishing and accelerating the firm'sArtificial Intelligence practice. This role requires deep technical expertise inadvanced Generative AI architectures and autonomous agent development, combinedwith proven strategic consulting and client relationship management skills.The primary purpose is to define the firm's AI Point of View (POV), translatecomplex AI agent capabilities into viable business value propositions, leadhigh-stakes client strategy engagements, and oversee the architectural design ofbillable AI solutions.ResponsibilitiesThe individual must be able to perform the following duties, with or withoutreasonable accommodation: * Strategy & POV: Contribute to the firm's commercial and technical POV, policies, and architecture regarding AI, Generative AI, and autonomous agent systems to secure competitive advantage. * Client Consulting: Lead executive-level workshops to identify high-ROI AI use cases, assess organizational readiness, and develop ethical AI adoption roadmaps. * Solution Structuring: Translate high-level business problems into actionable technical roadmaps, ensuring alignment with client data governance, security, and compliance requirements (e.g., GDPR, local data laws). * Pre-Sales: Partner with sales and account teams to structure, scope, and estimate complex AI consulting engagements, acting as the definitive subject matter expert. * Practice Enablement: Support the firm's practice integrations by providing AI learning/training and developing expertise in platforms like Workday. * Agent Design: Design and architect multi-step, autonomous AI agent systems (leveraging LLMs, Vector Databases, and orchestration frameworks like LangChain/AutoGen), focusing on scalability, reliability, and observability. * Architecture Governance: Establish best practices, technical standards, and Quality Assurance processes for all AI and Machine Learning Operations (MLOps) workflows. * Tooling Evaluation: Continuously evaluate and recommend AI builder tools, platforms (Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, etc.), and infrastructure choices based on performance and Total Cost of Ownership (TCO). * Ethical Oversight: Ensure all AI strategies and architectural designs adhere to job_description: Senior Solution Architect (m/w/d) – B2B SaaS | AI | DACHWarum diese Rolle bei WAIR.AI?Der Fashion- und Retail-Markt steht vor einem strukturellen Umbruch.Statische Regeln, manuelle Planung und isolierte Systeme stoßen an ihre Grenzen.Zukünftig entscheiden KI-basierte Systeme, wie Waren allokiert, nachgesteuertund zwischen Standorten intelligent umgelagert werden.WAIR.AI treibt genau diese Transformation voran.Wir entwickeln KI-Software, die Retail-Unternehmen befähigt, ihreBestandssteuerung grundlegend neu zu organisieren – datengetrieben, autonom undskalierbar. Wir wachsen global, und der DACH-Markt ist einer unserer strategischwichtigsten Wachstumsmärkte.Als Senior Solution Architect bist du bei WAIR.AI kein reiner Umsetzer, sondernarchitektonischer Mitgestalter dieser Transformation. Du schaffst das fachliche,technische und datengetriebene Fundament, auf dem unsere KI unter realenEnterprise-Bedingungen wirksam wird.Deine Rolle & VerantwortungFachlich-technische Kundenverantwortung * Du führst anspruchsvolle PreSales-, Discovery- und Architektur-Workshops mit Enterprise-Kunden im DACH-Markt. * Du analysierst Geschäftsprozesse, Datenrealität und bestehende IT-Landschaften – insbesondere im Fashion- und Retail-Umfeld. * Du bist souveräner Sparringspartner für Fachbereiche, IT-Leads und Entscheider auf Senior-Level. * Du schaffst Klarheit darüber, was fachlich sinnvoll, technisch machbar und langfristig skalierbar ist.Solution Design & Architektur * Du übersetzt fachliche Anforderungen rund um Allocation, Replenishment und Umlagerungen in tragfähige Lösungskonzepte. * Du definierst Zielarchitekturen rund um Wallie – inklusive Datenflüssen, Schnittstellen und Integrationslogik. * Du bewertest bestehende ERP-, Warenwirtschafts- und Planungssysteme und erkennst Risiken in Legacy-Strukturen frühzeitig. * Du prüfst, challengst und schärfst Architektur- und Integrationskonzepte von Kunden oder Implementierungspartnern.Daten & Integrationen * Du übernimmst Ownership für die Datenqualität, auf der unsere KI-Modelle operieren. * Du verantwortest die Validierung historischer und operativer Daten (z. B. Artikel, Standorte, Bestände, Abverkäufe). * Du erstellst Gap-Analysen, identifizierst Inkonsistenzen und führst strukturierte Data-Quality-Diskussionen mit Kunden-IT. * Du arbeitest hands-on mit APIs, Datenformaten und Integrationsarchitekturen – nicht als Entwickler, aber mit tiefem technischem Verständnis.Umsetzung & interne Zusammenarbeit * Du begleitest Kundenprojekte von der ersten fachlichen Diskussion bis zum Go-Live. * Du arbeitest eng mit Sales, Product, Engineering und Delivery zusammen und sorgst für saubere Übergaben. * Du dokumentierst Architekturentscheidungen, Integrationskonzepte und technische Setups. * Du unterstützt Knowledge-Transfer und Enablement nach der Implementierung.Was du mitbringstErfahrung & Seniorität * 7–10 Jahre Erfahrung als Solution Architect, Senior Consultant, Solution Engineer oder in vergleichbaren Rollen. * Mehrjährige Erfahrung mit komplexen B2B-SaaS- und Enterprise-Systemlandschaften. * Souveränität im Umgang mit Kunden, internen Stakeholdern und externen Partnern auf Senior-Level.Fachliche Kompetenz * Sehr gutes Verständnis für Fashion- und/oder Retail-Prozesse. * Erfahrung in Allocation, Replenishment, Warenplanung oder Bestandssteuerung ist ein klarer Vorteil. * Fähigkeit, fachliche Anforderungen kritisch zu hinterfragen und strukturiert in Lösungen zu überführen.Technisches & Datenverständnis * Erfahrung mit ERP-, Warenwirtschafts-, OMS- oder Planungssystemen. * Sicher im Umgang mit Integrationsarchitekturen, APIs (z. B. REST) und Datenmodellen. * Ausgeprägtes Verständnis für Datenqualität, Validierung und systemische Abhängigkeiten. * Du weißt, was technisch sauber, skalierbar und wartbar ist – auch ohne selbst zu entwickeln.Kommunikation & Sprache * Deutsch auf muttersprachlichem Niveau (zwingend). * Sehr gutes Englisch für die Zusammenarbeit im internationalen Umfeld. * Klare, präzise Kommunikation – fachlich fundiert und auf Augenhöhe. * Du übernimmst Verantwortung, triffst fundierte Entscheidungen und stehst dafür ein.Was wir dir bieten 1. job_description: Company DescriptionVersion 1 has celebrated over 28 years in Technology Services and continues tobe trusted by global brands to deliver solutions that drive customer success.Our expertise enables our customers to navigate the rapidly changingDigital-First world we live in. Qualifications * 10+ years experience in ICT Infrastructure, operations and cloud, solution and technical architecture. * Proven experience in cloud architecture (Azure and/or AWS), including governance and security. * Strong understanding of multi-cloud, hybrid cloud, and cloud-native services (serverless, containers, Kubernetes). * Experience with AI/ML integration and lifecycle management (data prep, training, deployment, monitoring). * Deep knowledge of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and IaC tools (Terraform, Bicep). * Expertise in application, integration, infrastructure, and security architecture. * Experience designing large-scale on-premise and hybrid cloud business applications. * Familiarity with architecture tools, frameworks, and methodologies. * Strong understanding of non-functional requirements (performance, scalability, availability). * Knowledge of Microsoft Azure services (Application Insights, Redis Cache, Service Bus, etc.). * Understanding of IT governance, regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR, ISO), and architectural governance. * Experience with API design, microservices, and federated identity providers. * Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders and document solutions effectively. * Demonstrated ability to shape strategic ICT and digital service direction. job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONSalesINDUSTRIESComputer Hardware Manufacturing, Software Development, and Computers andElectronics Manufacturing
job_description: NVIDIA’s Worldwide Field Operations (WWFO) team is looking for a SolutionsArchitect with deep expertise Generative AI post-training from data processingto model alignment, with a strong background in Large Language Models (LLMs). Inparticular, we are seeking someone skilled in data preparation and curation forlarge-scale model training, as well as in LLM alignment techniques such asreinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and Supervised Finetuning(SFT).In this role, you will operate at the intersection of innovative AI research andreal-world applications. You will work as the primary technical specialist forNVIDIA customers, helping drive innovation powered by NVIDIA’s hardware andsoftware platform. You will develop proof-of-concept solutions, demonstrateadvanced neural network architectures, and help customers adapt and optimizefoundation models using NVIDIA technologies for their specific domains. A keypart of this role involves close collaboration with a wide range of team membersincluding developers, data scientists, IT managers, and senior executives. Theideal candidate is an experienced AI specialist with a solid foundation in LLMsand expertise across data processing techniques including large scale datacuration, cleaning and Synthetic Data Generation. The candidate should haveconfirmed experience in Large-Scale post-training using supervised fine-tuningand/or Reinforcement Learning techniques. Hands-on experience applyingtechniques related to reinforcement learning for LLM alignment is a nice tohave.What You Will Be Doing * Serve as the primary technical expert to NVIDIA's customers, understanding their technology and providing guidance on post training process in terms of tools and methodology. * Build proof-of-concepts and demonstrations that highlight the power of NVIDIA AI platforms applied to LLMs post training. * Partner with developers, researchers, technology specialists, IT professionals, and executives to facilitate the integration of NVIDIA technology. * Partner with Engineering, Product and Sales teams to develop, plan best suitable solutions for customers. Enable development and growth of product features through customer feedback and proof-of-concept evaluations. What We Need To See * MS/PhD or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Data Science, Electrical/Computer Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, other Engineering fields. * Deep expertise in AI/Deep Learning, with hands-on experience in training and finetuning LLMs. * Expertise with deep learning frameworks for training LLMs (PyTorch, Megatron-LM, Nemo, Transformers, TRL, VeRL) * Excellent verbal, written communication, and technical presentation skills in English. * 6+ years' work or research experience with Python/ C++ / other software development * AI passionate with a growth mindset, ability to collaborate effectively with different teams (Engineering, Product, Sales, Marketing) in a rapid evolving environment while continuously learning and sharing insights. Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd * Familiarity with NVIDIA Nemo Collection (Nemo-Curator, Nemo-RL, Megatron-Bridge). * Track record in data processing as well as running LLM training and customization with Reinforcement Learning approaches. * Understanding of HPC systems: data center architecture high speed interconnect InfiniBand, Cluster Storage and Scheduling related design and/or management experience. Widely considered to be one of the technology world’s most desirable employers,NVIDIA offers highly competitive salaries and a comprehensive benefits package.As you plan your future, see what we can offer www.nvidiabenefits.com/NVIDIA is committed to fostering a diverse work environment and proud to be anequal opportunity employer. job_description: Als AI Solution Architect gestaltest du innovative ML-/AI-Lösungen von derKonzeption bis zur Produktion. Gemeinsam mit Data Scientists, Engineers und Stakeholdern treibst duAI-Innovationen voran und unterstützt das Team durch Coaching und Mentoring.Verantwortlichkeiten * Konzeption, Entwicklung und Skalierung von Enterprise AI-/ML-Lösungen * Aufbau und Optimierung von MLOps-Pipelines (CI/CD, Deployment, Monitoring, Retraining) * Performance-Optimierung und Orchestrierung von Modellen in produktiven Umgebungen * Sicherstellung von Robustheit, Fairness, Compliance und Security in AI-Anwendungen * Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Data Scientists & Engineers bei Datenpipelines, Feature Stores und Modellvalidierung * Auswahl und Integration moderner Tools, Frameworks und Architekturen * Mitgestaltung von Standards, Best Practices und strategischer Roadmap im Bereich AI/ML * Coaching und Mentoring von Junior- und Mid-Level-Engineers Qualifikationen * Mehrjährige Erfahrung in Architektur, Implementierung und Betrieb von AI-/ML-Lösungen * Fundierte Kenntnisse in GenAI, LLMs, MLMs und RAG (Architektur, Prompt Engineering, Fine-Tuning, Agent-Orchestrierung) * Erfahrung mit gängigen Frameworks wie LangChain, LangGraph oder Haystack * Sehr gute Programmierkenntnisse in Python sowie Praxis mit CI/CD-Pipelines * Know-how in Cloud-Umgebungen (z. B. Azure, AWS, GCP, Databricks), Container-Technologien (Docker, Kubernetes) und IaC (Terraform) * Vertrautheit mit MLOps (MLflow, Deployment, Observability, Governance) * Kenntnisse in Compliance & Security (z. B. DSGVO, ISO/IEC 27001/27701, TISAX) * Erfahrung in der Konzeption digitaler Lösungen und in der Präsentation vor Kunde Erforderliche Fähigkeiten * Abgeschlossenes Studium in Informatik, Mathematik, Data Science oder vergleichbarer Fachrichtung * Fließende Deutschkenntnisse (mindestens C1-Niveau) sowie gute Englischkenntnisse sind erforderlich Gewünschte Fähigkeiten * Kenntnisse in Software-Engineering (Clean Code, Design Patterns, Testing) * Erfahrung in Projekt- oder Team-Management (Scrum, CRISP-DM) * Praxis mit lokalen LLMs (Llama.cpp, Ollama, vLLM, Unsloth) und gängigen ML-Bibliotheken (PyTorch, scikit-learn, OpenCV) * Erfahrung im Aufbau von AI-Plattformen (Enterprise Search, Testautomatisierung, Coding Agents) * Know-how in Datenanalyse (Statistik, Tableau, R) * Zertifizierungen in AI, ML, Cloud oder Software-Engineering Leistungen * Bei Expleo setzen wir auf Teamwork, Offenheit, Transparenz und Wertschätzung. Must have a track record of driving technical consensus on high-stakes architectural decisions. Preferred Qualifications * Background in AI-driven platforms, AI Agents, ML based solutions. Familiarity with Azure AI Foundry or Google Agentspaces. * Experience in cross-organization alignment (client–vendor–partner triangle). * Experience in leading engineering teams. * Experience in managing globally distributed teams. Establish strongcoordination with Product, Architecture, and DevOps leads.Architecture Leadership & System Design: Define and own Platform Architecture,serve as the Enterprise Architect, designing and owning the core platformblueprint for scalability, security, and performance across the organization.This includes definitive decision-making on component selection, cloud topologyand deployment model (on-prem/air-gapped).Technical Governance: Define and maintain engineering standards, architectureguidelines, and code quality practices. Collaborate with other tech leads toensure scalability, security, and compliance with policies and guardrails.Conduct deep technical reviews to ensure all implementations adhere to theapproved system architectureCross-Team Alignment: Manage dependencies across internal and external teams.Lead coordination of milestones, risks, and change management to maintainsynchronization across all partners.Stakeholder Management: Serve as a senior engineering counterpart for clientstakeholders, ensuring transparency, accountability, and clear communication onprogress, blockers, and technical decisions.Resource & Capacity Planning: Own capacity planning and workload distributionacross engineering domains. Anticipate resource constraints, propose mitigationplans, and support staffing decisions.Quality & Risk Management: Monitor engineering performance through metrics andKPIs. Identify risks early, ensure mitigation steps are tracked, and maintainquality assurance across all deliverables.Innovation & Continuous Improvement: Promote automation, reusable components,and AI-assisted engineering practices. Encourage continuous improvement throughlessons learned and engineering retrospectives.Team Leadership & Mentorship: Build and nurture a strong engineering culture.Provide mentorship to technical leads and senior engineers, fostering growth,ownership, and accountability.What we offerCulture of caring. At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Acrossevery region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first.From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance andbelonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections withcollaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.Learning and development. We are committed to your continuous learning anddevelopment. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with manyopportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career atGlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogicoffers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunitiesto grow personally and professionally.Interesting & meaningful work. GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact forand with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chanceto work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage yourcuriosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimaginewhat’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll havethe privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactfulsolutions shaping the world today.Balance and flexibility. Your life extends beyond the office, and we always do our best to help youintegrate and balance the best of work and life, having fun along the way!High-trust organization. We are a high-trust organization where integrity iskey. By joining GlobalLogic, you’re placing your trust in a safe, reliable, andethical global company. Integrity and trust are a cornerstone of our valueproposition to our employees and clients. You will find truthfulness, candor,and integrity in everything we do.About GlobalLogicGlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partnerto the world’s largest and most forward-thinking companies. job_description: KOSTAL Group is a global, independent, family-owned company, based in Germany.We develop and manufacture technologically complex electronic and mechatronicproducts for automotive and other industries. We employ more than 20.000 peopleat 46 locations, offering flexible, knowledgeable and customer-focused service.Shared Services Center provides internal IT and other services to the company'ssubsidiaries globally.DescriptionAbout the RoleWe are seeking an AI Solution Architect to shape and drive the design,implementation, and continuous evolution of our AI ecosystem. This role is notonly technical but also strategic, as the successful candidate will grow intothe future lead of our internal AI team. You will lay the foundation forbuilding a strong AI capability within the organization, with a focus onenhancing self-service AI offerings such as our internal KostalGPT, consultingIT experts on AI usage, and - most importantly - building and governing an AIplatform while realizing AI use cases together with the internal team andexternal experts. You will work primarily with Microsoft Azure and leading AIproviders, including OpenAI, to create scalable, innovative, andbusiness-oriented solutions.Key Responsibilities * Design, implement, and operate AI solutions aligned with IT objectives, ensuring seamless integration with existing systems and processes. * Collaborate with stakeholders through workshops and direct engagement to understand needs and translate them into practical AI solutions. * Provide architectural leadership for AI platform development and governance. * Participate in the definition and continuous refinement of the AI adoption roadmap within IT. * Lead workshops, training, and knowledge-sharing sessions to upskill IT experts on AI technologies. * Build, mentor, and lead the internal AI team as it is established, fostering a culture of innovation and collaboration. * Take an active hands-on role in prototyping, configuring, and delivering AI solutions together with internal and external experts. * Manage and guide the future AI DevOps team (including developers and operations specialists) and coordinate with external experts to realize and operate AI use cases, ensuring resilient, future-ready solutions. QualificationsRequired Skills & Qualifications * Proven experience architecting and delivering solutions on major cloud platforms, with emphasis on AI (including agentic AI), enterprise-scale systems, and related tools (Azure, OpenAI, etc.). * Strong understanding of AI/ML services, agentic AI architectures, orchestration frameworks, Kubernetes, and cloud-native environments. * Ability to quickly analyze and understand complex business processes, translating requirements into practical technical solutions. * Hands-on expertise with AI services, machine learning models, and analytics platforms. * Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences. * Solid project management capabilities, with a track record of delivering solutions in cross-functional, agile environments. * Demonstrated leadership potential and motivation to build and manage a high-performing AI team. * Minimum of 5 years of professional experience in IT and 2 years in AI. * University degree in Computer Science or a comparable field. * Very good English skills, both written and spoken. Desirable Experience * Experience building and executing AI adoption strategies within an enterprise. * Familiarity with enterprise-scale data architectures and AI governance frameworks. * Advanced degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related field. Professional certifications (e.g., Microsoft Azure Solutions Architect Expert,AI Engineer Associate, or equivalent).Benefits * Flexible working conditions with remote work possibility (in-person presence is required from time to time) * Opportunity to develop your knowledge and skills through stimulating work, including development and implementation of new processes and tools * Benefits package including private health insurance, sport cards, flexible monthly budgets, bonuses for special occasions, performance bonus and other .cls-1 { fill: #1e467d; } APPLY NOWShow more Show less

We foster strong partnerships with leadingtechnology giants including Microsoft, AWS, Oracle, Red Hat, OutSystems,Snowflake, ensuring that our customers are provided with the highest qualitysolutions and services.We’re An Award-winning Employer Reflecting How Our Employees Are At The VeryHeart Of Version 1 And What We Do * UK & Ireland's premier AWS, Microsoft & Oracle partner * 3300+ strong, €350/£300m revenue business * 10+ years as a Great Place to Work in Ireland & UK * Best Workplace for Women in the UK & Ireland by GPTW * Best Workplace for Wellbeing in the UK by GPTW We’re a core values driven company, we hire people who share our values, and wereward those who display and foster them, it’s deeply embedded within our DNA.Invest in us and we’ll invest in you!Job DescriptionAs a Cloud / AI Solution Architect, you will lead the design and delivery ofscalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud-native and AI/ML solutions. This is adelivery-focused role, responsible for building PoCs, MVPs, and production-readyarchitectures that integrate AI capabilities into enterprise platforms. You willwork closely with cross-functional teams to ensure solutions meet businessobjectives, technical standards, and compliance requirements.Key Responsibilities * Architect and Deliver AI Solutions * Translate business requirements into end-to-end AI/ML architectures including data pipelines, model lifecycle, and MLOps. * Build and productionize PoCs and MVPs for AI use cases (including GenAI, LLMs, embeddings, RAG pipelines). * Cloud-Native Architecture * Design secure, scalable architectures on Azure and/or AWS using containers, serverless, API management, and event-driven patterns. * Implement multi-cloud and hybrid strategies where required. * Data Platforms & Integration * Develop data lakes, lakehouses, and warehouses using platforms like Databricks, Azure Synapse, Delta Lake. * Ensure data governance, lineage, and compliance (GDPR, ISO). * Automation & DevOps * Automate infrastructure using Terraform, Bicep, and implement CI/CD pipelines for apps and ML workflows. * Security & Governance * Apply best practices for identity, access, encryption, and compliance. * Maintain architecture documentation and ensure alignment with IT strategy. * Leadership & Collaboration * Guide developers, data scientists, and engineers through delivery phases. * Share best practices and create reusable accelerators for future projects. Qualifications * 10+ years in ICT infrastructure, cloud, and solution architecture. * Proven experience delivering AI/ML solutions from PoC to production. * Expertise in Azure and/or AWS cloud-native services, microservices, and API design. * Strong knowledge of MLOps, IaC (Terraform, Bicep), and CI/CD. * Experience with data platforms (Databricks, Synapse, Delta Lake) and governance. * Familiarity with GenAI, LLMs, vector search, and responsible AI practices. * Excellent communication and documentation skills. Additional InformationWhy Version 1?At Version 1, we believe in providing our employees with a comprehensivebenefits package that prioritises their wellbeing, professional growth, andfinancial stability. * Share in our success with our Quarterly Performance-Related Profit Share Scheme, where employees collectively benefit from a share of our company's profits. * Strong Career Progression & mentorship coaching through our Strength in Balance & Leadership schemes with a dedicated quarterly Pathways Career Development programme. * Flexible/remote working, Version 1 is tremendously understanding of life events and people’s individual circumstances and offer flexibility to help achieve a healthy work life balance. * Financial Wellbeing initiatives including; Pension, Private Healthcare Cover, Life Assurance, Financial advice and an Employee Discount scheme. * Employee Wellbeing schemes including Gym Discounts, Bike to Work, Fitness classes, Mindfulness Workshops, Employee Assistance Programme and much more. Generous holiday allowance, enhanced maternity/paternity leave, marriage/civil partnership leave and special leave policies. * Educational assistance, incentivised certifications, and accreditations, including AWS, Microsoft, Oracle, and Red Hat. * Reward schemes including Version 1’s Annual Excellence Awards & ‘Call-Out’ platform. * Environment, Social and Community First initiatives allow you to get involved in local fundraising and development opportunities as part of fostering our diversity, inclusion and belonging schemes. And many more exciting benefits… drop us a note to find out more.Ekta Bahl - Talent Acquisition Capability PartnerShow more Show less

job_description: NVIDIA has been redefining computer graphics, PC gaming, and acceleratedcomputing for more than 25 years. Today, we lead in artificial intelligence,driving advances in natural language processing, computer vision, autonomoussystems, and scientific research. We are looking for a forward-thinking HPC andAI Inference Software Architect to help shape the future of scalable AIinfrastructure—focusing on distributed training, real-time inference, andcommunication optimization across large-scale systems. Join our world-class teamof researchers and engineers building next-generation software and hardwaresystems that power the most demanding AI workloads on the planet.What You Will Be Doing * Design and prototype scalable software systems that optimize distributed AI training and inference—focusing on throughput, latency, and memory efficiency. * Develop and evaluate enhancements to communication libraries such as NCCL, UCX, and UCC, tailored to the unique demands of deep learning workloads. * Collaborate with AI framework teams (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, JAX) to improve integration, performance, and reliability of communication backends. * Co-design hardware features (e.g., in GPUs, DPUs, or interconnects) that accelerate data movement and enable new capabilities for inference and model serving. * Contribute to the evolution of runtime systems, communication libraries, and AI-specific protocol layers. What We Need To See * Ph.D. or equivalent industry experience in computer science, computer engineering, or a closely related field. * 2+ years of experience in systems programming, parallel or distributed computing, or high-performance data movement. * Strong programming background in C++, Python, and ideally CUDA or other GPU programming models. * Practical experience with AI frameworks (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow) and familiarity with how they use communication libraries under the hood. * Experience in designing or optimizing software for high-throughput, low-latency systems. * Strong collaboration skills in a multi-national, interdisciplinary environment. Ways To Stand Out From The Crowd * Expertise with NCCL, Gloo, UCX, or similar libraries used in distributed AI workloads. * Background in networking and communication protocols, RDMA, collective communications, or accelerator-aware networking. * Deep understanding of large model training, inference serving at scale, and associated communication bottlenecks. * Knowledge of quantization, tensor/activation fusion, or memory optimization for inference. * Familiarity with infrastructure for deployment of LLMs or transformer-based models, including sharding, pipelining, or hybrid parallelism. At NVIDIA, you’ll work alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry,pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in AI and high-performance computing.If you're passionate about distributed systems, AI inference, and solvingproblems at scale, we want to hear from you.NVIDIA is at the forefront of breakthroughs in Artificial Intelligence,High-Performance Computing, and Visualization. Our teams are composed of driven,innovative professionals dedicated to pushing the boundaries of technology. Weoffer highly competitive salaries, an extensive benefits package, and a workenvironment that promotes diversity, inclusion, and flexibility. As an equalopportunity employer, we are committed to fostering a supportive and empoweringworkplace for all.Your base salary will be determined based on your location, experience, and thepay of employees in similar positions. For Poland: The base salary range is176,250 PLN - 305,500 PLN for Level 2, and 221,250 PLN - 383,500 PLN for Level3.JR1997486Show more Show less

job_description: OverviewWith more than 45,000 employees and partners worldwide, the Customer Experienceand Success (CE&S) organization is on a mission to empower customers toaccelerate business value through differentiated customer experiences thatleverage Microsoft’s products and services, ignited by our people and culture.We drive cross-company alignment and execution, ensuring that we consistentlyexceed customers’ expectations in every interaction, whether in-product,digital, or human-centered. CE&S is responsible for all up services across thecompany, including consulting, customer success, and support across Microsoft’sportfolio of solutions and products. Join CE&S and help us accelerate AItransformation for our customers and the world.Customer Health Success Programs aim to strengthen security & resiliency, drivecloud success, and spark AI innovation ensuring that Microsoft Unified customersquickly realize value from their investment in our cloud.The Senior Cloud Solution Architect (CSA) with POD Lead responsibilities isaccountable for driving delivery excellence, technical quality, and operationaldiscipline within a designated group of vendor CSAs (the POD).This position demands a strong technical foundation, advanced project managementexpertise, and proven leadership skills to ensure that every engagementdelivered through the Success Program meets Microsoft’s highest standards forquality, consistency, and customer satisfaction.As both a technical expert and operational leader, the POD Lead overseesend-to-end delivery performance, enforces compliance with standards, and acts asa regional focal point for escalations and strategic alignment. Through hands-onengagement delivery, quality oversight, and mentoring, the POD Lead elevatesboth customer outcomes and team capability.It will require an investigative approach, a challenger mindset, and deepexperience working with our customers in their Secured cloud environments suchas GCC/H, Sovereign Cloud and more. You will work to build relationships at thelocal, investigate creative approaches to staffing and delivery directly to yourcustomers in your area of expertise (Azure Resiliency, Security, and/or AI).Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on theplanet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset,innovate to empower others and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each daywe build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create aculture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.In line with our Flexible Work approach, for roles at Microsoft Germany,Austria, and Switzerland, we recommend spending at least two days per week inthe office or at the customer site.ResponsibilitiesTechnical Delivery & Quality * Partner with Secured CSU leaders, delivery partners, and global/national CSA teams enabling Success Program Deliveries across our Secured customer base in your assigned markets. * Serve as a technical authority within the POD, providing architectural guidance, best practice validation, and delivery assurance across multiple Microsoft solution areas (Azure, Security, AI, or Modern Work). * Conduct random delivery audits, reviewing customer deliverables for accuracy, alignment to frameworks, and technical depth. * Lead key customer engagements to set delivery standards, ensuring technical excellence and knowledge transfer. * Partner with SMEs and IP Leads to pilot new content and improve delivery methodologies based on field insights. Program & Project Management * Maintain the Rhythm of Business (ROB) cadence by facilitating bi-weekly POD syncs, monthly dashboards, and quarterly business reviews to ensure visibility, accountability, and performance tracking. * Monitor vendor CSA utilization, engagement compliance, and CSAT performance, applying short-term corrective actions and operational optimizations based on data insights. Drive delivery lifecycle governance, ensuring timely kickoffs, milestone tracking, deliverables submission, and closeouts fully aligned with Success Program SLAs and documentation standards. * Oversee workload planning and capacity management in collaboration with Resource Coordinators (RCs) and Service Delivery Managers (SDMs) to balance priorities and ensure effective allocation. * Track and report key performance indicators (KPIs)—including utilization, CSAT, audit coverage, compliance, and billable contribution—to assess delivery health and inform decision-making Leadership & People Enablement * Act as a territorial leader, representing the POD in regional forums, QBRs, and stakeholder reviews. * Mentor and enable vendor CSAs, local OU CSAs, and national/global teams fostering a culture of accountability, growth, and continuous improvement. * Partner with CSAMs, TZ Leads, and SDMs to ensure engagement readiness, operational compliance, and business alignment. * Promote knowledge sharing and collaboration across PODs and solution areas, driving operational maturity. * Proactively identify systemic issues or delivery risks and collaborate with leadership to implement corrective actions. Innovation & IP Contribution * Provide structured feedback loops to IP Leads and central teams to improve delivery IP and automation opportunities. * Participate in pilot programs and testing of new Success Program engagements or frameworks. * Champion innovation by bringing field learnings, best practices, and process improvement ideas back into the global community. Qualifications * Proven experience in IT consulting, cloud architecture, or technical delivery leadership. * Proven technical expertise across Microsoft Cloud services (Azure, M365, or Security solutions). * Ability to understand and apply AI concepts within customer and operational contexts. * Strong project management background, including governance, reporting, and delivery lifecycle management. * Demonstrated experience in leading distributed teams and coordinating cross-functional delivery with partners and vendors. * Solid understanding of ITIL, DevOps, and operational frameworks (change management, incident response, SLAs, KPIs). * Ability to communicate effectively with executive, technical, and operational stakeholders. * Excellent written communication and documentation skills; able to produce high-quality customer deliverables. * Experience leading or managing large-scale delivery teams under managed services or customer success models. * Knowledge of SRE principles, Governance & Compliance frameworks, or Operational Resiliency practices. * Proven ability to mentor and coach others in technical or delivery excellence roles. * Experience with multi-partner or vendor management models. * Working knowledge of Power BI, Azure DevOps, or automation tools for operational reporting and analytics. * Fluency in German and English * This role may require country‑specific government security clearance. Required * Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert * Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate * Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate * ITIL® Foundation (preferably ITIL 4 Foundation) This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications acceptedon an ongoing basis until the position is filled.Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants willreceive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry,citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression,genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition,national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protectedveteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (includingpregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected byapplicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. job_description: Im Wertstrom "Analytics & AI" gestalten wir die Brücke zwischen Fachlichkeit undTechnologie, verknüpfen standardisierte Services zu ganzheitlichenLösungen – für Einheiten aller Kenntnisstände und Anforderungen.
